routes.seo_title: Zonules of Zinn — The Suspension System That Holds Focus | Zonules.com
routes.meta_description: The zonules of Zinn suspend the crystalline lens in precise tension, making accommodation and optical focus possible. A governed reference unit on the hidden suspension layer of vision.
